calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Set For Trial On Oct-20-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents To Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated, No. 21; And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAPHNE WANG's, Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents To Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated, No. 21; And Production Of Documents.

Plaintiff Daphne Wang's motion to compel further responses from Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated to her Request for Production of Documents, No. 21 and for production of documents in accordance with Defendant's statement of compliance with respect to Request for Production of Documents, Nos. 27 and 28 is GRANTED.

Plaintiff's meet and confer was reasonable.

The requests at issue are reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (CCP Section 2017.010.) Plaintiff has shown Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated responses are incomplete.

Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated has not demonstrated that any of its objections has merit.

The court orders Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated to provide further responses to Request for Production Nos. 21 and include all recordings of Bright Idea's Friday work meetings during Plaintiff's employment.

Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated appears to concede it has failed to produce documents in accordance with its statement of compliance with respect to Request for Production Of Documents Nos. 27 and 28. In any event, the court orders Defendant to produce documents in accordance with its statement of compliance for Nos. 27 and 28.

Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated must provide a verification. For the responses to which Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated is claiming a privilege, Defendant shall produce a privilege log. Further responses, verification (if not yet provided) and privilege log due no later than 10 court days from notice of this order.

The court does not find Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated acted with substantial justification. Defendant shall pay $500 as sanctions, payable to the court by way of the clerk of the court (a copy of this order to accompany payment), payment no later than by April 28, 2025, receipt filed no later than May 4, 2025.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents To Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated, No. 21; And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAPHNE WANG's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents To Defendant Bright Idea Incorporated, No. 21.

Continued to April 7, 2025. Opposing party is ordered to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Failure to comply with this written order may result in sanctions or contempt proceedings. The court notes that any party can obviate the need for a continuance of a motion for lack of courtesy copies by simply lodging a complete set of courtesy copies of all documents related to the motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
